message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.0 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.0", default-features =
  false, features = ["test-internals"] }` → `{ version = "0.3.0",
  default-features = false, features = ["test-internals"] }` at
  [workspace.dependencies]. ft-runtime + ft-serialize resolve it via
  `asupersync = { workspace = true }`.
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`.
